initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT L.ID) / 12.0 AS avg_monthly_count
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'M'
  AND L.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT L.ID) * 1.0 / 12 AS average_monthly_count
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'M'
  AND L.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) * 1.0 / 12 AS average_monthly_count
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M'
  AND Laboratory.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31';

SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS average_male_patients_per_month
FROM (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', Laboratory.Date) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) AS monthly_count
    FROM Laboratory
    JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
    WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M'
      AND Laboratory.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
    GROUP BY month
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT L.ID) AS monthly_count
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'M'
  AND L.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', L.Date);

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) * 1.0 / 12 AS average_monthly_count
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M'
  AND Laboratory.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31';

candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS average_monthly_count
FROM (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', Laboratory.Date) AS month,
           COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) AS monthly_count
    FROM Laboratory
    JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
    WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M'
      AND Laboratory.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
    GROUP BY month
);

WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', Laboratory.Date) AS month,
           COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) AS monthly_count
    FROM Laboratory
    JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
    WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M'
      AND Laboratory.Date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', Laboratory.Date)
)
SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS average_monthly_count
FROM monthly_counts;
